title: Operating Under Constraint: Job Search With MS
description: Job search with multiple sclerosis: cognitive load, interview prep, using AI as a devil’s advocate, and framing automation as feedback systems—not memorization.

title: Accessibility Is Not Just a Feature
description: Why treating accessibility as infrastructure, not an afterthought, leads to more resilient systems—and better engineering for everyone.

title: How Living With MS Changed the Way I Engineer Software
description: Exploring the nuances of building under constraints—from determinism and recovery to automation and accessibility.

title: Building Tools for the Version of You That’s Running Low
description: Design personal tooling for the tired version of you: reduce decisions, survive interruptions, and make state and failures obvious.
